entities.name: EASTERN RAJASTHAN, INDIA
entities.description: A low rainfall semi-arid region in India where the study was conducted

entities.name: LOW RAINFALL
entities.description: A climatic condition characterizing the study area

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A high-risk environmental stressor in the region

entities.name: DEGRADED NATURAL RESOURCES
entities.description: The state of natural resources in the study area

entities.name: POVERTY
entities.description: A socio-economic condition prevalent in the region

entities.name: FOOD INSECURITY
entities.description: A condition of lacking reliable access to sufficient affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: MALNUTRITION
entities.description: A condition resulting from poor diet or lack of nutrients

entities.name: INTEGRATED WATERSHED MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A potential approach for agriculture growth and rehabilitation of degraded lands

entities.name: GOKULPURA-GOVERDHANPURA VILLAGE
entities.description: The specific site in Bundi, eastern Rajasthan, where the project was implemented

entities.name: HOLISTIC SYSTEMS APPROACH
entities.description: The approach used to implement the integrated watershed project

entities.name: GROUNDWATER AVAILABILITY
entities.description: The amount of water available underground, which increased due to interventions

entities.name: CROPPING PATTERNS
entities.description: The sequence and spatial arrangement of crops grown on a given area

entities.name: HIGH VALUE CROPS
entities.description: Crops that yield higher returns per unit area

entities.name: IRRIGATED AREA
entities.description: The land area receiving artificial water application

entities.name: CROPPING INTENSITY
entities.description: The ratio of total cropped area to net sown area

entities.name: CROP DIVERSIFICATION
entities.description: The practice of growing a wider variety of crops

entities.name: COMMERCIAL CASH CROPS
entities.description: Crops grown specifically for sale in the market

entities.name: SOCIO-ECONOMIC STATUS
entities.description: The combined social and economic position of the watershed community

entities.name: INCOME
entities.description: The financial gain of the people in the watershed

entities.name: EMPLOYMENT OPPORTUNITIES
entities.description: Job prospects generated by watershed interventions

entities.name: MIGRATION
entities.description: The movement of skilled and unskilled labor from villages to urban areas

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL QUALITY
entities.description: The state of the environment in the watershed

entities.name: ECOLOGICAL STATUS
entities.description: The health and stability of the ecosystem in the watershed

entities.name: VEGETATIVE INDEX
entities.description: A measure of greenery or vegetation cover

entities.name: RUNOFF
entities.description: The flow of water that occurs when excess stormwater flows over the earth's surface

entities.name: SOIL LOSS
entities.description: The removal of the topsoil layer

entities.name: LAND DEGRADATION
entities.description: The decline in the quality of land

entities.name: BIO-DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variety of life in the fragile ecosystems

entities.name: SOIL AND WATER CONSERVATION
entities.description: The practice of protecting soil from erosion and managing water resources
